data.title: PZ Cussons Executives Increase Stakes Through Share Incentive Plan
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

PZ Cussons ( (GB:PZC) ) has shared an announcement.

PZ Cussons has disclosed that several senior executives, including Chief Executive Officer Jonathan Myers, Chief Financial Officer Sarah Pollard, Chief Supply Chain Officer Steve Noble and Company Secretary and General Counsel Kareem Moustafa, have acquired ordinary shares under the company’s 2020 Share Incentive Plan. On 19 January 2026 each of the executives purchased 212 partnership shares at £0.706 per share on the London Stock Exchange and received an associated grant of 141 matching shares at no cost, in transactions partly conducted on XLON and partly outside a trading venue, further increasing management’s equity participation in the group.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PZC) stock is a Hold with a £75.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PZ Cussons stock, see the GB:PZC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:PZC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:PZC is a Neutral.

PZ Cussons’ overall stock score reflects a mixed financial performance with challenges in profitability and cash flow. However, positive earnings guidance and strong corporate events suggest potential for improvement. Technical indicators and valuation metrics indicate a cautious market sentiment.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:PZC stock, click here.

More about PZ Cussons

PZ Cussons plc is a UK-listed consumer goods company best known for its portfolio of personal care, beauty and home care brands, with operations across developed and emerging markets. The group’s shares are traded in London and it operates executive share incentive structures to align management with shareholder interests.

Average Trading Volume: 714,764

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Société Générale Takes 5.22% Indirect Stake in Jyske Bank
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Jyske Bank A/S ( (GB:0MGD) ).

Jyske Bank A/S has disclosed that French financial group Société Générale S.A. has built an indirect position of 3,208,942 Jyske Bank shares, equivalent to 5.22% of the bank’s total share capital, as of 15 January 2026. The stake, held via shares and other financial instruments with similar economic effect, marks Société Générale as a significant shareholder and underscores continued international investor interest in Jyske Bank, potentially influencing the bank’s shareholder structure and governance dynamics.

More about Jyske Bank A/S

Jyske Bank A/S is a Danish financial institution operating in the banking sector, providing a range of banking and financial services to retail and corporate clients. The bank plays a significant role in Denmark’s capital markets, with its shares actively held and traded by international financial institutions.

data.title: SuperQ and 01 Quantum Partner to Deliver End-to-End Quantum-Safe Cybersecurity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Atco Mining Inc. ( (TSE:QBTQ) ) has provided an announcement.

SuperQ Quantum Computing Inc. has entered a strategic partnership with 01 Quantum Inc. to integrate 01 Quantum’s patent-protected IronCAP post-quantum cryptography into SuperQ’s SuperPQC offering, turning it from a purely diagnostic AI tool into a full end-to-end quantum security solution. The combined platform will allow enterprises to both identify “harvest-now, decrypt-later” vulnerabilities and implement quantum-safe encryption and digital signing across key systems like email, VPNs, file storage, cloud services, websites and blockchains, positioning SuperQ to capture a larger share of the growing quantum cybersecurity market while increasing platform stickiness and providing a turnkey PQC stack for auditors and consulting firms seeking to align clients with emerging NIST standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:QBTQ) stock is a Hold with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Atco Mining Inc. stock, see the TSE:QBTQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:QBTQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:QBTQ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity). Technicals are supportive but look overbought, while valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E and no dividend. Positive corporate events (product announcements and financing) provide some offset but do not overcome the current financial risk profile.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:QBTQ stock, click here.

More about Atco Mining Inc.

SuperQ Quantum Computing Inc. is a Calgary-based quantum and supercomputing company focused on reducing technical and financial barriers to commercialization of advanced computing. Through its flagship Super™ platform and consumer-facing ChatQLM product, SuperQ aims to make quantum and supercomputing accessible and intuitive for enterprises, research institutions and government agencies across sectors such as finance, healthcare, logistics and defense, using proprietary AI “Autopilots” to deliver one-click, business-ready outcomes.

Average Trading Volume: 289,639

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$33.2M

data.title: Vast Resources Sets AGM as It Prepares Shareholder Vote on Gulf Minerals Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Vast Resources ( (GB:VAST) ) just unveiled an update.

Vast Resources has called its Annual General Meeting for 11:00 a.m. on 12 February 2026 at Nettlestead Place in Kent, with the formal notice, proxy form and chairman’s letter now posted to shareholders and available on the company’s website. In his letter, Chairman Brian Moritz explains that the AGM timetable was delayed to align, as far as possible, with a separate General Meeting required to approve the proposed acquisition of Tajikistan-focused Gulf International Minerals and related share issuance and Rule 9 waiver under the UK Takeover Code; while differing notice periods prevent the two meetings being formally combined at this stage, the board may adjourn the AGM if the AIM admission document is published during the AGM notice period so both meetings can proceed together, giving investors a clearer view of the transaction’s implications for Vast’s growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:VAST) stock is a Hold with a £0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vast Resources stock, see the GB:VAST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:VAST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:VAST is a Underperform.

Vast Resources is struggling with significant financial and operational challenges, including declining revenues and negative profitability. The technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, and the valuation metrics are poor. These factors collectively result in a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:VAST stock, click here.

More about Vast Resources

Vast Resources plc is an AIM-quoted mining company focused on developing and operating mineral assets. The group’s activities span exploration and production, with a particular emphasis on gold and other metals, and it seeks growth through acquisitions and joint ventures in emerging mining jurisdictions.

Average Trading Volume: 146,212,235

Current Market Cap: £6M

The latest update is out from Wise PLC Class A ( (GB:WISE) ).

Wise plc has disclosed that Chief People Officer Isabel Naidoo and Chief Legal Officer Jessica Winter have both sold portions of their holdings in the company’s Class A ordinary shares, in transactions reported under UK Market Abuse Regulation. Naidoo disposed of 20,000 shares at £9.374904 each and Winter sold 3,000 shares at £9.510764 each, with both transactions executed on 20 January 2026 on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, providing investors with updated visibility on insider dealing activity but without indicating any change to their roles or to the company’s strategic direction.

Diageo ( (GB:DGE) ) has issued an update.

Diageo has disclosed a routine share transaction involving Executive Committee member John O’Keeffe under the company’s One World Share Incentive Plan. On 19 January 2026, O’Keeffe purchased ordinary partnership shares in Diageo using salary deductions and received a corresponding allocation of matching shares, in line with the plan’s 50% match feature, with the purchase executed on the London Stock Exchange and the matching award made off-market, as required under UK Market Abuse Regulation disclosure rules.

data.title: Definium Therapeutics Launches Educational LSD Campaign to Advance Psychedelic Psychiatry
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Definium Therapeutics ( (DFTX) ) has shared an announcement.

Definium Therapeutics has launched “Rerouting Minds,” an educational campaign designed to inform healthcare providers, mental health professionals, advocates, and policymakers about the scientific evidence and therapeutic potential of pharmaceutical lysergide (LSD) in treating severe mental health disorders. By highlighting LSD’s extensive research history, proposed mechanisms of action, and emerging clinical data, the initiative aims to foster informed dialogue, increase awareness of psychedelic-based treatment options, and reinforce Definium’s positioning at the forefront of the so‑called psychedelic renaissance in psychiatric care.

The most recent analyst rating on (DFTX) stock is a Buy with a $61.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Definium Therapeutics stock, see the DFTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DFTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DFTX is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by weak financial performance (no revenue, sizeable ongoing losses, and heavy cash burn), partially offset by a stronger near-term setup from the earnings call (financing runway and clear Phase III catalysts) and supportive technical momentum. Valuation remains challenging due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on DFTX stock, click here.

More about Definium Therapeutics

Definium Therapeutics, formerly Mind Medicine (MindMed) Inc., is a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company focused on developing a new generation of therapeutics to address the underlying causes of psychiatric and neurological disorders. Headquartered in New York and listed on Nasdaq under the symbol DFTX, the company applies scientific rigor to psychedelic-based treatments with the goal of creating accessible, scalable solutions for severe mental health conditions amid a growing global mental health crisis.

Average Trading Volume: 1,962,988

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.48B

data.title: Marquie Group Revises GetGolf.com Control Acquisition Agreement
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Marquie Group ( (TMGI) ) has issued an update.

On January 19, 2026, The Marquie Group, Inc. and GetGolf.com entered into a Second Amended and Restated Purchase Agreement that revises the terms under which GetGolf.com will acquire voting control of the company, including recharacterizing certain payments to seller Marc Angell as purchase price consideration rather than compensation. The amended deal formally excludes the Mountain Brook Golf Course from the assets to be acquired after the buyer was unable to secure mutually acceptable third-party financing and other terms, a change that materially reduces the scale of the transaction as originally envisioned, though the parties are continuing to move forward under the revised structure.

data.title: Dasin Retail Trust Manager Faces Judicial Management Application by Maybank
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Dasin Retail Trust ( (SG:CEDU) ).

Dasin Retail Trust Management Pte. Ltd., trustee-manager of Dasin Retail Trust, has received formal court papers confirming that Malayan Banking Berhad’s Singapore branch has filed an application to place the trustee-manager, both in its own capacity and as manager of the trust, under judicial management in the General Division of the High Court of Singapore. The company has also been notified that a Registrar’s Case Conference has been scheduled for 21 January 2026, and it has committed to updating investors via SGXNet on any material developments, signalling a period of heightened legal and operational uncertainty for the trust and its stakeholders.

More about Dasin Retail Trust

Dasin Retail Trust is a Singapore-listed business trust managed by Dasin Retail Trust Management Pte. Ltd., which acts as trustee-manager. The trust is focused on owning and operating retail property assets, providing investors with exposure to income-generating retail real estate primarily in the Chinese market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$16.09M

Find detailed analytics on CEDU stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
